description_text: Item Condition Information: New 4pcs Car Carbon Fiber Rear Bumper Shark Fins Diffuser Protector Lower Spoiler Lip Trim Covers Wing Splitter Accessories Product name: Triangular rear lip spoiler. Material: ABS Size: 15cm Packing size: length 17cm*width 13cm*height 5cm Color: black Specifications: A set of four + screws + strong double-sided tape. Installation Instructions: This product is suitable for most models. The back of the product is directly attached to the rear bumper with strong double-sided, and then reinforced with screws for more stable installation.
